---
title: "K-Means Assignment"
author: "Jean Alvarez"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Table of Contents"
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    transition: zoom
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Overview"
    scrollable: true
---
